Short-link Generator

Shorten a link. We even snap a thumbnail so embeds in Twitter, Discord, and Slack render with a nice preview.

{% endif %} {% if short_url %}

(preview unavailable for this URL)

{% endif %}
{% endif %}
Short-link Generator v0.3 · powered by Flask + wkhtmltoimage
